description_long: This grass patch consists of numerous upright, slender green blades interspersed with small, rounded blue elements resembling berries or pebbles. The blades are unevenly distributed, creating a natural, slightly wild appearance with some open soil visible between clusters. The patch is generally circular in shape, with the grass blades varying slightly in height and density across the surface. The blue elements are scattered throughout, adding visual interest and a sense of biodiversity. The edges of the patch are irregular, with some blades extending outward, blending gently into the surrounding ground. The overall look is that of a semi-maintained urban green space, possibly found in parks or roadside verges.
description: A circular patch of green grass blades with scattered blue elements, featuring an irregular, natural edge and moderate density. The patch includes visible soil and a mix of blade heights, evoking a semi-wild urban green space.
description_view_0: This view shows the patch from above and slightly to the side, highlighting the irregular distribution of grass blades and the scattered blue elements.
description_view_1: This lower angle emphasizes the density of the grass blades and the spread of blue elements across the patch, with more soil visible in the center.
description_view_2: From this side, the varying heights of the grass blades are more apparent, and the blue elements are seen interspersed throughout the patch.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the patch's edge, with blades extending outward and blue elements concentrated near the perimeter.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_e: The grass patch blends naturally into the surrounding soil, with some blades and blue elements extending beyond the main patch, creating a soft transition.
